commandRunRefs.outputSummary: COMMAND_ID: CMD-TEST-001 | COMMAND: npx vitest run tests/acceptance/requirements-contract-checkpoint-automation.test.ts | RUN_ID: run-TRACE-001-20260525T070822Z | CLOSEOUT_ATTEMPT_ID: attempt-TRACE-001-20260525T070822Z | STARTED_AT: 2026-05-25T07:08:22.846Z | COMPLETED_AT: 2026-05-25T07:08:38.161Z | EXIT_CODE: 0 | STDOUT: | [1m[46m RUN [49m[22m [36mv4.0.18 [39m[90mD:/Dev/BMAD-Speckit-SDD-Flow[39m |  [32m✓[39m tests/acceptance/requirements-contract-checkpoint-automation.test.ts [2m([22m[2m14 tests[22m[2m)[22m[33m 13226[2mms[22m[39m |      [33m[2m✓[22m[39m fails closed when unrelated staged files exist before checkpoint commit [33m 321[2mms[22m[39m |      [33m[2m✓[22m[39m creates a single-file checkpoint commit and progress record [33m 619[2mms[22m[39m |      [33m[2m✓[22m[39m blocks pre-render readiness when checkpoint logs exist but global consistency is missing [33m 4027[2mms[22m[39m |      [33m[2m✓[22m[39m runs all pre-render checkpoints as separate commits and reports ready only after global consistency passes [33m 3718[2mms[22m[39m |      [33m[2m✓[22m[39m resumes from progress next checkpoint and runs remaining checkpoints separately [33m 3786[2mms[22m[39m | [2m Test Files [22m [1m[32m1 passed[39m[22m[90m (1)[39m | [2m      Tests [22m [1m[32m14 passed[39m[22m[90m (14)[39m | [2m   Start at [22m 15:08:24 | [2m   Duration [22m 13.45s[2m (transform 44ms, setup 0ms, import 96ms, tests 13.23s, environment 0ms)[22m | STDERR:
